info.name: Falafel-E-Khaas
info.description: Savour the great taste with shallow fried chickpea nuggets with a blend of aromatic spices.

info.name: Aftaabi Paneer Tikka Masala
info.description: Savour tender, char-grilled paneer chunks with this authentic tikka masala curry. A mouthwatering combination of flavour and texture, indulge in this lajawab paneer peshkash for a royal daawat!

info.name: Royal Dates (2 Pcs)
info.description: (2 pcs) 100% naturally sweet kimia dates, eaten first to break the fast during Ramadan. Simple, nourishing, and essential. (Energy: 63KCal, Carbohydrates: 15gm)

info.name: Lucknowi Paneer Subz Biryani (Paneer Dum and Veg Biryani)(Mild Spicy)
info.description: Narm paneer and fresh subz layered with the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s classic recipe - mildly spicy. The splash of kewra water adds aroma and freshness, while birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices bring a royal touch to every bite.

info.name: Lucknowi Subz-e-Biryani (Veg Dum Biryani)(Mild Spicy)
info.description: Fresh subz and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s classic recipe - mildly spicy. The splash of kewra water adds aroma and freshness, while birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices bring a royal touch to every bite.

info.name: Lucknowi Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani (Paneer Dum Biryani)(Mild Spicy)
info.description: Narm paneer and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s classic recipe - mildly spicy. The aroma of kewra water and the adornment of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices enrich its zaikedaar warmth.

info.name: Lucknowi Taj-e-Khumb Biryani (Mushroom Biryani)(Mild Spicy)
info.description: Tender mushrooms and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s classic recipe - mildly spicy. The splash of kewra water adds aroma and freshness, while birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices bring a royal touch to every bite.

info.name: Lucknowi Raaz-e-Kalimirch Paneer Biryani (Pepper-Paneer)(Mild Spicy)
info.description: Narm paneer wrapped in kali mirch,s warmth, layered with the longest-grain basmati rice and 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s classic recipe - mildly spicy. The aroma of kewra water and the adornment of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices add a regal richness to every bite.

info.name: Hyderabadi Raaz-e-Kalimirch Paneer Biryani (Pepper Paneer)(Spicy)
info.description: Narm paneer enriched with kali mirch,s warmth, paired with the longest-grain basmati rice and 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s Hyderabadi recipe - bold & spicy. The aroma of kewra water and the garnish of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices add depth and a bold, peppery zayqa.

info.name: Hyderabadi Subz-e-Biryani (Veg Dum Biryani)(Spicy)
info.description: Fresh subz and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s Hyderabadi recipe - bold & spicy. Aromatic kewra water and a royal garnish of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices add a vibrant, fiery zayqa to this hearty subz feast.

info.name: Hyderabadi Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani (Paneer Dum Biryani)(Spicy)
info.description: Tender paneer and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht for hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s Hyderabadi recipe - bold & spicy. Lifted by the aroma of kewra water and finished with birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices for a rich, fiery zayqa.

info.name: Hyderabadi Paneer Subz Biryani (Paneer and Veg Dum Biryani)(Spicy)
info.description: Fresh subz and narm paneer layered with the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht over hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s Hyderabadi recipe - bold & spicy. Aromatic kewra water and a hearty garnish of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices bring a vibrant, fiery zayqa to this paneer-subz feast.

info.name: Hyderabadi Taj-e-Khumb Biryani (Mushroom Biryani)(Spicy)
info.description: Tender mushrooms and the longest-grain basmati rice, dum-pukht over hours with 23 shahi masale. This is Behrouz,s Hyderabadi recipe - bold & spicy. The aroma of kewra water and the royal garnish of birista, almonds, coriander and whole spices add a deep, fiery zayqa to every bite.

info.name: Dumdaar Hyderabadi Rice
info.description: The refined flavours of Hyderabadi spices infused with basmati rice dum pukht to perfection and topped with fresh coriander leaves (Energy: 348KCal, Carbohydrates: 35gm, Proteins: 4gm, Fats: 19gm, Sodium: 938mg)

info.name: Paneer Tikka Kathi Roll
info.description: Spiced Paneer Tikka chunks cradled within a mulayam rumali roti enriched with a layer of green chutney and mint mayo Topped with taaza onions this roll is truly worth savouring till the last bite (Energy: 573KCal, Carbohydrates: 61gm, Proteins: 19gm, Fats: 28gm, Sodium: 742mg)

info.name: 1 +1 Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani & Kebab Thali Combo
info.description: A combo of Thali with Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani six Falafels Onion lemon salad and mint raita Finished with soft gulab jamun A perfect nawabi treat for two rich flavorful and made to satisfy every craving with a royal touch (Energy: 1698KCal, Carbohydrates: 184gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 84gm, Sodium: 1156mg)

info.name: Paneer Subz Biryani Thali with Kebabs
info.description: Lazzatdar Paneer Subz Biryani with 6 Falafels, Onion Lemon salad, and raita. Complete your shahi dawat with gulab jamun.

info.name: Taj-e-Khumb Biryani Thali with Kebabs
info.description: Taj-e-Khumb Biryani with 6 Falafels, Onion Lemon salad, and mint raita. Gulab jamun adds the final nazaqat to your shahi feast.

info.name: Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani Thali with Kebabs
info.description: Zaikedaar Paneer Biryani with 6 Falafels, Onion Lemon salad, and mint raita. End with gulab jamun - a truly nawabi indulgence.

info.name: Subz-E-Biryani Thali with Kebabs
info.description: Mehekti Subz-E-Biryani with 6 Falafels, Onion Lemon salad, and raita. End your feast with the mithaas of gulab jamun.

info.name: Royal Paneer Lababdar Thali
info.description: Makhmali Paneer Lababdar gravy with 2 portions of paratha or Kulcha, 2 karare dahi kebabs, onions, and lemon. End your shahi dawat with gulab jamun - the shaan of desserts.

info.name: Royal Paneer Tikka Masala Thali
info.description: Decadent Aftaabi Paneer Tikka Masala with 2 portions of paratha or Kulcha, 2 mulayam dahi kebabs, onions, and lemon. Seal your nawabi dawat with gulab jamun - pure lazzat.

info.name: Rivayati Paneer Curry Combo (Serves 2)
info.description:
Paneer Curry (500 gm) with Choice of Bread (Pack of 4).
Set up a wholesome daawat for 2 with your choice of North Indian paneer curry and breads.

info.name: Paneer Lababdar
info.description: Relish this mildly sweet curry of tender paneer with an aromatic blend of kaju, fresh tomatoes, sliced onions and shahi masalas. Make the most of this Punjabi peshkash with your favourite biryanis & breads!

info.name: Aftaabi Paneer Tikka Masala
info.description: Savour tender, char-grilled paneer chunks with this authentic tikka masala curry. A mouthwatering combination of flavour and texture, indulge in this lajawab paneer peshkash for a royal daawat!

info.name: Nafees Laccha Paratha (Pack of 4)
info.description: Make it an indulgent daawat with these flaky parathas, fried until crispy with desi ghee. Nothing beats these crowd favourite flatbreads for a wholesome meal. (Energy: 1596KCal, Carbohydrates: 196gm, Proteins: 42gm, Fats: 71gm, Sodium: 1200mg)

info.name: Durbari Tawa Paratha (Pack of 3)
info.description: Have an indulgent and satisfying feast with these large, triangular shaped parathas seared on tawa until crispy. Nothing beats these crispy parathas for a wholesome meal. (Energy: 324KCal, Carbohydrates: 60gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 24gm, Sodium: 423mg)

info.name: Nafees Laccha Paratha (Pack of 2)
info.description: Make it an indulgent daawat with these flaky parathas, fried until crispy with desi ghee. Nothing beats these crowd favourite flatbreads for a wholesome meal. (Energy: 798KCal, Carbohydrates: 98gm, Proteins: 21gm, Fats: 35gm, Sodium: 600mg)

info.name: Shaandaar Paneer Curries Combo (Serves 2)
info.description:
1 Paneer Curry (500gm), Choice of Bread (Pack of 4), Kebab (6pcs) and a Beverage.
Daawat ka aaghaz karein with your favourite paneer curry and bread and pair it with a lajawab kebab and beverage.

info.name: Paneer Tikka Kathi Roll
info.description: Spiced Paneer Tikka chunks cradled within a mulayam rumali roti enriched with a layer of green chutney and mint mayo Topped with taaza onions this roll is truly worth savouring till the last bite (Energy: 573KCal, Carbohydrates: 61gm, Proteins: 19gm, Fats: 28gm, Sodium: 742mg)

info.name: Dahi Labneh Kebab
info.description: Enriched with gentle flavours of Curd, this kebab is delicately spiced with cumin and ginger & beautifully complements the royal biryani

info.name: Falafel-E-Khaas
info.description: Savour the great taste with shallow fried chickpea nuggets with a blend of aromatic spices.

info.name: Royal Paneer Tikka Masala Thali with Rice
info.description: Decadent Aftaabi Paneer Tikka Masala with basmati, 2 mulayam dahi kebabs, onions, and lemon. Seal your nawabi dawat with gulab jamun - pure lazzat. (Energy: 918KCal, Carbohydrates: 104gm, Proteins: 24gm, Fats: 43gm, Sodium: 893mg)

info.name: Royal Dal Makhani Thali with Rice
info.description: Makhmali Dal Makhani with basmati, 2 golden dahi kebabs, onions, and lemon. Finish your meal with gulab jamun - the perfect ikhtitam to your shahi indulgence. (Energy: 815KCal, Carbohydrates: 89gm, Proteins: 19gm, Fats: 41gm, Sodium: 192mg)

info.name: Royal Dal Makhani Thali
info.description: Makhmali Dal Makhani with 2 portions of paratha or Kulcha, 2 golden dahi kebabs, onions, and lemon. Finish your meal with gulab jamun - the perfect ikhtitam to your shahi indulgence.

info.name: Royal Dates (2 Pcs)
info.description: (2 pcs) 100% naturally sweet kimia dates, eaten first to break the fast during Ramadan. Simple, nourishing, and essential. (Energy: 63KCal, Carbohydrates: 15gm)

info.name: Gulab Jamun Box (Pack of 10)
info.description: Gulab Jamun. Soft. Plump and the way we are used to. There is nothing else in our gulab jamuns than authenticity and love. (Energy: 1884KCal, Carbohydrates: 352gm, Proteins: 28gm, Fats: 37gm, Sodium: 250mg)

info.name: Moong Dal Halwa (300gm)
info.description: Add this rich & decadent Indian dessert made with moong lentils, ghee, milk, sugar, garnished with chopped dry-fruits. Perfect for one with Indian sweet cravings. (Energy: 1391KCal, Carbohydrates: 167gm, Proteins: 26gm, Fats: 68gm, Sodium: 600mg)

info.name: Chocolate Cheesecake Slice
info.description: Cheesecake and chocolate lovers, 'tis one's specially for you! A match made for the season, sure to elevate every celebration.

info.name: Moong Dal Halwa (80 gm)
info.description: Add this rich & decadent Indian dessert made with moong lentils, ghee, milk, sugar, garnished with chopped dry-fruits. Perfect for one with Indian sweet cravings (Energy: 473KCal, Carbohydrates: 56gm, Proteins: 9gm, Fats: 23gm, Sodium: 200mg)

info.name: Gulab Jamun (Pack Of 2)
info.description: Gulab Jamun. Soft. Plump and the way we are used to. There is nothing else in our gulab jamuns than authenticity and love. (Energy: 377KCal, Carbohydrates: 70gm, Proteins: 5gm, Fats: 7gm, Sodium: 50mg)

info.name: Badam Kesar Thandai
info.description: Rich, refreshing, and fasting-friendly, our Badam Kesar Thandai is the perfect upvas treat! (Energy: 198KCal, Carbohydrates: 25gm, Proteins: 9gm, Fats: 4gm, Sodium: 100mg)

info.name: Mint Raita (80 gm)
info.description: Mint raita is a refreshing and cooling raita made with mint, whisk yogurt and cumin. (Energy: 45KCal, Carbohydrates: 4gm, Proteins: 2gm, Fats: 2gm, Sodium: 228mg)

info.name: Mughlai Gravy
info.description: Mughlai Gravy, a classic popular North India dish has a thick & creamy gravy with a flavor of yogurt and the taste of ground and whole spices.

info.name: Coca Cola Bottle (475 mL)
info.description: 475 mL Coca Cola Bottle. (Energy: 209KCal, Carbohydrates: 52gm, Sodium: 40mg)

info.name: Ayran (Buttermilk)
info.description: A popular drinks from the land of Behrouz, Ayran is a Persian take of buttermilk topped with mint. (Energy: 76KCal, Carbohydrates: 5gm, Proteins: 3gm, Fats: 3gm, Sodium: 715mg)

info.name: Thums Up Can (330 mL)
info.description: 330 mL Thums Up Can (Energy: 145KCal, Carbohydrates: 36gm)

info.name: Masala Lemonade (200 mL)
info.description: 94KCal , Carbs: 24g. A refreshing classic drink with combined goodness of fresh lime , himalayan pink salt & infused spices. (Energy: 94KCal, Carbohydrates: 24gm)

info.name: Jeera Masala Cola (250 ml)
info.description: Experience a twisty take on the classic bubbly cola, infused with cumin that makes for a refreshing Jeera Masala Cola.
